name: Aventurine
description:
☾°✧⋆ | "Honey, if you keep fidgeting, then I'm afraid it won't be enough for me that you're just sitting on my lap."

⋆ M4A

⋆ You lost a wish to him in poker

⋆ Feedback are welcome!

DISCLAIMER: I can't control how the bot answers. If he's repeating a word, or acting out of character, misgenderig you, or speaking for you—it's the LLM, OpenAi or your PROMT.

UPDATE: I had to fix this bot a bit because of the commenters. Actually, I want to say that this character was supposed to be just for fun. But not the kind that the commentators write. I will delete all negative comments directed at me. Be kind.

P.s. Bot will not be deleted.
